reviews.comment:
Es verdad que hay mucha fila para cargar, pero esto se repite en varias estaciones de la capital. Lo están modernizando por completo. El taller del ACA que está arriba es espectacular.

(Translated by Google)
It's true there are long lines to refuel, but this is the case at several stations in the capital. They're completely modernizing it. The ACA workshop upstairs is spectacular.

reviews.comment:
De terror. Llevé mi auto por un problema de frenos, me dijeron que debia reparar el servo porque nuevo era muy caro, ellos no lo hacían. En el mismo taller del ACA pedí una grua de traslado y me dijeron que ellos no lo hacían. Llevé el auto a otro taller y el tema no fue el servo sino ajustar el bulbo del freno. Como mecánicos y servicio dejan mucho que desear.

(Translated by Google)
It was awful. I took my car in for a brake problem, and they told me I needed to repair the brake booster because a new one was too expensive, and they didn't do it. At the same ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) workshop, I asked for a tow truck, and they told me they didn't do that either. I took the car to another workshop, and the problem wasn't the booster but adjusting the brake light switch. Their mechanics and service leave much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcjc2RFJnEAE
